nodes.label: G2 Technology Competition and Productivity
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 155958_冰冰小美_G2竞争必然，科技拉近差距，产业规模同步增长，争夺全球市场，那么估值也会拉近。不然美国市场不就崩溃了。美国崩溃有什么好处.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: China-US competition is framed as driving technology, industrial scale, and converging valuations; productivity growth and production-relation change are presented as preferable to disorder.

edges.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 155958_冰冰小美_G2竞争必然，科技拉近差距，产业规模同步增长，争夺全球市场，那么估值也会拉近。不然美国市场不就崩溃了。美国崩溃有什么好处.md
